title: Yortal's Emporium

{{Quote|The Sith make such trouble for me and business has been slow.|translated=1|Yortal Ixlis, to Revan|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Yortal's Emporium''',<ref name="kotor" /> also known as '''Yortal Ixlis's Junk Shop''',<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> was a small shop located in the eastern part of [[Ahto City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] in [[3956 BBY]]. It mainly sold used mechanical merchandise, ranging from [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating for [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bikes, to special [[Droid/Legends|droid]] weaponry such as [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]]. The store was owned and maintained by the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Yortal Ixlis]].<ref name="kotor" />

The store was originally opened when Ixlis was placed on Manaan by the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]. He was instructed to sell used merchandise to pay a debt he owed due to the failure of a task given to him by a Czerka executive. [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] from the [[Sith Embassy]] located near the store would often visit the shop to harass the shopkeeper.<ref name="kotor" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
In [[3956 BBY]], the amnesiac [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited the shop while trying to find the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Star Map]] hidden on Manaan. After Revan proved that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were kidnapping young [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]], he was offered a discount at the store for his actions.<ref name="kotor" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Yortal's Emporium was featured in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.. It was also mentioned in [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|the game's strategy guide]] as Yortal Ixlis's Junk Shop.
